mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN post_status = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting, SUM(CASE WHEN post_status = 'R' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS received, SUM(CASE WHEN post_status = 'P' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processing, SUM(CASE WHEN post_status = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed FROM TB_POST_INFO WHERE reg_id = #{userId} AND post_use_yn = 'Y' AND YEAR(reg_dt) = YEAR(GETDATE())

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN post_status = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting, SUM(CASE WHEN post_status = 'R' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS received, SUM(CASE WHEN post_status = 'P' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processing, SUM(CASE WHEN post_status = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed FROM TB_POST_INFO WHERE post_use_yn = 'Y' AND YEAR(reg_dt) = YEAR(GETDATE())

SELECT TOP 5 P.post_seq, P.post_title, P.reg_dt, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, P.reg_dt, GETDATE()) <= 7 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS is_new FROM TB_POST_INFO P JOIN TB_BOARD_INFO B ON P.board_id = B.board_id WHERE B.board_type = 'NORMAL' AND B.board_title LIKE '%공지%' AND P.post_use_yn = 'Y' AND P.notice_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY P.reg_dt DESC
SELECT board_id, board_title, board_type, board_desc FROM TB_BOARD_INFO WHERE board_use_yn = 'Y' AND board_type IN ('NORMAL', 'QNA', 'FAQ') ORDER BY board_id
